advertiser-aegis.prompt: Create a polished retail brand logo with a transparent background. Return exactly one logo or wordmark only, centered on the canvas. No background plate, no box, no label sticker, no mockup, no billboard, no paper texture, no product, no mascot costume, no watermark, and no extra words beyond the brand identity itself. Use crisp vector-style edges, modern brand design, and strong readability at small sizes for dashboards, live previews, and in-store screens. Prefer a clean wordmark or a simple combined icon-plus-wordmark lockup. Brand name: Aegis. Retail context: electronics. Brand cues: accessory, amplifier, audio, camera, capture, checkout-attach, creator, dac. Representative products: GameCore 16 RTX, USB-C Multi Dock, Aegis ForgeBook 14 Gaming Laptop. Leave enough transparent padding around the logo so it can sit on different backgrounds.
